mapper.select: select USER_ID , USER_UUID , USER_NM , PHONE , GENDER , BIRTH , EMAIl , HEIGHT , WEIGHT from T_USER_TRAN where 1=1 and USER_UUID = #{user_uuid}

select TITLE , EXPLN , DATE_FORMAT(POST_STR, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_STR , DATE_FORMAT(POST_END, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_END , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DTM , DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MOD_DTM , NOTI_SEQ from T_NOTICE_TRAN where 1=1 AND date(#{start_date}) >= POST_STR or POST_END >= date(#{end_date})
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
AND EXPLN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
AND (TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR EXPLN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by REG_DTM DESC

select TITLE , EXPLN , DATE_FORMAT(POST_STR, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_STR , DATE_FORMAT(POST_END, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_END , REG_ID , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REG_DTM , MOD_ID , DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MOD_DTM , NOTI_SEQ from T_NOTICE_TRAN where 1=1 and NOTI_SEQ = #{noti_seq}

select QSTN_CONTS, ANSR_CONTS, USE_YN, MOD_ID, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MOD_DTM, FAQ_SEQ from T_FAQ_TRAN where 1=1 AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND FAQ_GB in('W','T') AND (QSTN_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')OR ANSR_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')) order by REG_DTM DESC
select QSTN_CONTS, ANSR_CONTS, USE_YN, MOD_ID, DATE_FORMAT(MOD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS MOD_DTM, FAQ_SEQ from T_FAQ_TRAN where 1=1 and FAQ_SEQ = #{faq_seq}

SELECT CGM_DTM , UPT_VALUE , (select UPT_VALUE from ( SELECT CGM_DTM, UPT_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{user_uuid} ORDER BY date_add(CGM_DTM,interval - 1 hour) DESC limit 2 )k order by CGM_DTM ASC limit 1 ) - UPT_VALUE AS GAP_VALUE FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN WHERE USER_UUID = #{user_uuid} ORDER BY cgm_dtm DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE(a.CGM_DTM) AS date, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(a.UPT_VALUE), 1), 0) AS avgBlood FROM T_BLDINF_TRAN a JOIN T_FOODHIS_TRAN b ON a.USER_UUID = b.USER_UUID WHERE a.USER_UUID = #{userId} AND DATE(a.CGM_DTM) BETWEEN DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND DATE(b.EAT_DATE) BETWEEN DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{start}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))AND DATE(DATE_FORMAT(#{end}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) AND TIME(a.CGM_DTM) BETWEEN TIME(b.EAT_DATE) AND TIME(DATE_ADD(b.EAT_DATE, INTERVAL 2 HOUR)) GROUP BY DATE(a.CGM_DTM) ORDER BY DATE(a.CGM_DTM);
